# ADELIE Construction

> ADELIE Construction is a San Diego County residential remodeling contractor focused on transparent project planning, clearly defined scope, assumptions, allowances, changes and coordinated construction.

## Primary resources
- [Remodeling Academy](https://www.adelieconstruction.com/academy.html): structured homeowner learning paths.
- [Homeowner Guides](https://www.adelieconstruction.com/resources.html): budgeting, permits, materials, timelines and contractor selection.
- [Free Download Center](https://www.adelieconstruction.com/downloads.html): branded planning workbooks and checklists.
- [Remodel Budget Planner](https://www.adelieconstruction.com/remodel-budget-planner.html): educational budget organization tool.
- [Remodeling FAQ](https://www.adelieconstruction.com/remodeling-faq.html): concise answers to common homeowner questions.

## Services
Kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, whole-home remodeling, ADUs, home additions, cabinets, flooring, tile, painting, plumbing and electrical coordination, pools and outdoor living.

## Service area
San Diego County, California. Availability depends on scope, access and schedule.

## Important limitation
Website information is educational. Project-specific pricing, permits, code requirements, engineering and schedules must be verified for the property and scope.
